codeReview.summary: Red Team role docs capture adversarial tone, numbered objection format, zero-objection violation, and non-blocking post-mortem, but the pre-dispatch workflow does not instruct the Red Team polecat to create the blocking dependency itself, so VAL-ROLES-005 is not fully satisfied.

issues.description: Mode 1 states the Mayor creates the review bead and `blocks` link (lines 52-53), and the Red Team steps only consume an existing review bead. The feature and contract require the Red Team pre-dispatch workflow to create the review bead that blocks the batch (VAL-ROLES-005), so this required responsibility is left unimplemented/ambiguous in the role instructions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: integration-worker guidance for role setup is underspecified for Red Team gate ownership. It asks to include adversarial stance but does not explicitly require Red Team instructions to create/link the blocking review bead, which likely contributed to assigning gate creation to Mayor.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md:43-47 covers role setup and adversarial stance, but no explicit requirement that Red Team creates `bd link --type blocks`; implemented role doc says Mayor creates blocked review flow (research/roles/red-team/CLAUDE.md:52-53).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker spent exploratory effort discovering bead ID extraction behavior (`bd create -q` still emits verbose output) before switching to `--json`; this operational detail is not documented in shared skill/library guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 54d011ac-3c3f-425d-9cb0-eb74607103b6 includes: 'The `-q` flag produces more than just the ID' followed by `bd create "Test Quiet" -q` and then `bd create "Test JSON" --json`.

summary: Review result is fail due to one blocking contract mismatch. The role docs include adversarial behavior, structured objections, and advisory post-mortem guidance, but they do not assign Red Team to create/link the pre-dispatch blocking review bead as required by VAL-ROLES-005.
